title: career-ops.pipeline.drained v1
description: Per-run summary emitted at the end of a pipeline-drain cycle — the scheduled agentic run that drains data/pipeline.md's Pending inbox (liveness sweep, A-F evaluation, tracker merge). One event per run, not per row. Producer: the career-pipeline-drain systemd service's headless agent, via the same validate-then-append JSONL pattern as job-search-se's nervousBus.js. Consumers: hearth surfaces (funnel health card), kb ingest.

swept.description: Pending rows liveness-checked this run (the sweep covers the whole inbox, zero-token).

expired.description: Rows auto-moved to Processed/Discarded because the posting is dead.

evaluated.description: Rows that received a full A-F evaluation + report this run (bounded per-run batch).

escalated.description: Evaluated rows that cleared the steering threshold and were included in the run's single consolidated steering digest.

pending_remaining.description: Inbox backlog left after this run.

trigger.description: Whether the run was fired by career-pipeline-drain.timer or invoked by hand.

run_log.description: Path to the run's log file under career-ops/data/drain-run-logs/.
